// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

[Flags]
public enum SortedEnumFormat : byte
{
    None = 0,
    Name = 1,
    Value = 2,
    DisplayName = 4,
    Description = 8,
    Default = Name | Value
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;

public static partial class Enums
{
    public static partial class SortedEnum
    {
        public const int MemberCount = 3;
        public const bool IsFlagEnum = false;

        public static string[] GetMemberNames() => _names ??= new string[] {
                "Two",
                "Three",
                "One"
            };

        public static global::SortedEnum[] GetMemberValues() => _values ??= new global::SortedEnum[] {
                global::SortedEnum.Three,
                global::SortedEnum.One,
                global::SortedEnum.Two
            };

        public static Int32[] GetUnderlyingValues() => _underlyingValues ??= new Int32[] {
                3,
                2,
                1
            };

        public static bool TryParse(string value, out global::SortedEnum result, SortedEnumFormat format = SortedEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & SortedEnumFormat.Name) == SortedEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("One", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Two", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Two;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Three", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Three;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & SortedEnumFormat.Value) == SortedEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("2", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Two;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("3", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Three;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & SortedEnumFormat.DisplayName) == SortedEnumFormat.DisplayName)
            {
                if (value.Equals("Bravo", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Alpha", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Two;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Charlie", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Three;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & SortedEnumFormat.Description) == SortedEnumFormat.Description)
            {
                if (value.Equals("Second", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("First", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Two;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Third", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Three;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

#if NETSTANDARD2_1_OR_GREATER || NETCOREAPP3_1_OR_GREATER
        public static bool TryParse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, out global::SortedEnum result, SortedEnumFormat format = SortedEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if ((format & SortedEnumFormat.Name) == SortedEnumFormat.Name)
            {
                if (value.Equals("One", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Two", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Two;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Three", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Three;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & SortedEnumFormat.Value) == SortedEnumFormat.Value)
            {
                if (value.Equals("2", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("1", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Two;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("3", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Three;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & SortedEnumFormat.DisplayName) == SortedEnumFormat.DisplayName)
            {
                if (value.Equals("Bravo", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Alpha", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Two;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Charlie", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Three;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            if ((format & SortedEnumFormat.Description) == SortedEnumFormat.Description)
            {
                if (value.Equals("Second", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.One;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("First", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Two;
                    return true;
                }

                if (value.Equals("Third", comparison))
                {
                    result = global::SortedEnum.Three;
                    return true;
                }
            }
            result = default;
            return false;
        }

        public static global::SortedEnum Parse(ReadOnlySpan<char> value, SortedEnumFormat format = SortedEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out global::SortedEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value.ToString()}");

            return result;
        }
#endif

        public static global::SortedEnum Parse(string value, SortedEnumFormat format = SortedEnumFormat.Default, StringComparison comparison = StringComparison.Ordinal)
        {
            if (!TryParse(value, out global::SortedEnum result, format, comparison))
                throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

            return result;
        }

        public static bool IsDefined(global::SortedEnum input)
        {
            Int32[] _isDefinedValues = GetUnderlyingValues();

            for (int i = 0; i < _isDefinedValues.Length; i++)
            {
                if (_isDefinedValues[i] == (Int32)input)
                    return true;
            }

            return false;
        }

        public static (global::SortedEnum, string)[] GetDisplayNames() => _displayNames ??= new (global::SortedEnum, string)[] {
                (global::SortedEnum.Three, "Charlie"),
                (global::SortedEnum.One, "Bravo"),
                (global::SortedEnum.Two, "Alpha")
            };

        public static (global::SortedEnum, string)[] GetDescriptions() => _descriptions ??= new (global::SortedEnum, string)[] {
                (global::SortedEnum.Three, "Third"),
                (global::SortedEnum.One, "Second"),
                (global::SortedEnum.Two, "First")
            };

        private static string[]? _names;
        private static global::SortedEnum[]? _values;
        private static Int32[]? _underlyingValues;
        private static (global::SortedEnum, string)[]? _displayNames;
        private static (global::SortedEnum, string)[]? _descriptions;

    }
}
// <auto-generated />
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis;

public static partial class SortedEnumExtensions
{
    public static string GetString(this global::SortedEnum value)
    {
        return value switch
        {
            global::SortedEnum.One => "One",
            global::SortedEnum.Two => "Two",
            global::SortedEnum.Three => "Three",
            _ => value.ToString()
        };
    }

    public static string GetString(this global::SortedEnum value, SortedEnumFormat format = SortedEnumFormat.Default)
    {
        if ((format & SortedEnumFormat.DisplayName) == SortedEnumFormat.DisplayName)
        {
            if (value == global::SortedEnum.One) return "Bravo";
            if (value == global::SortedEnum.Two) return "Alpha";
            if (value == global::SortedEnum.Three) return "Charlie";
        }

        if ((format & SortedEnumFormat.Description) == SortedEnumFormat.Description)
        {
            if (value == global::SortedEnum.One) return "Second";
            if (value == global::SortedEnum.Two) return "First";
            if (value == global::SortedEnum.Three) return "Third";
        }

        if ((format & SortedEnumFormat.Name) == SortedEnumFormat.Name)
        {
            if (value == global::SortedEnum.One) return "One";
            if (value == global::SortedEnum.Two) return "Two";
            if (value == global::SortedEnum.Three) return "Three";
        }

        if ((format & SortedEnumFormat.Value) == SortedEnumFormat.Value)
        {
            return ((Int32)value).ToString(System.Globalization.NumberFormatInfo.InvariantInfo);
        }

        return value.ToString();
    }

    public static bool TryGetUnderlyingValue(this global::SortedEnum value, out Int32 underlyingValue)
    {
        switch (value)
        {
            case global::SortedEnum.One:
                underlyingValue = 2;
                return true;
            case global::SortedEnum.Two:
                underlyingValue = 1;
                return true;
            case global::SortedEnum.Three:
                underlyingValue = 3;
                return true;
        }
        underlyingValue = default;
        return false;
    }

    public static Int32 GetUnderlyingValue(this global::SortedEnum value)
    {
        if (!TryGetUnderlyingValue(value, out Int32 underlyingValue))
            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

        return underlyingValue;
    }

    public static bool TryGetDisplayName(this global::SortedEnum value,
#if NETSTANDARD2_1_OR_GREATER || NETCOREAPP3_1_OR_GREATER
[NotNullWhen(true)]
#endif
out string? displayName)
    {
        switch (value)
        {
            case global::SortedEnum.One:
                displayName = "Bravo";
                return true;
            case global::SortedEnum.Two:
                displayName = "Alpha";
                return true;
            case global::SortedEnum.Three:
                displayName = "Charlie";
                return true;
        }
        displayName = null;
        return false;
    }

    public static string GetDisplayName(this global::SortedEnum value)
    {
        if (!TryGetDisplayName(value, out string? displayName))
            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

        return displayName!;
    }

    public static bool TryGetDescription(this global::SortedEnum value,
#if NETSTANDARD2_1_OR_GREATER || NETCOREAPP3_1_OR_GREATER
[NotNullWhen(true)]
#endif
out string? description)
    {
        switch (value)
        {
            case global::SortedEnum.One:
                description = "Second";
                return true;
            case global::SortedEnum.Two:
                description = "First";
                return true;
            case global::SortedEnum.Three:
                description = "Third";
                return true;
        }
        description = null;
        return false;
    }

    public static string GetDescription(this global::SortedEnum value)
    {
        if (!TryGetDescription(value, out string? description))
            throw new ArgumentOutOfRangeException($"Invalid value: {value}");

        return description!;
    }
}
